params.aspect: 'old' is ambiguous; state the assumed 1450-1550 window and invite the user to narrow by century, region, or language

records.title: Joannis Cuspiniani ... de Caesaribus atque imperatoribus Romanis opus insigne : Dedicatio operis ad ... Carolum quintum per Christophorum Scheurle
notes: Includes: Vita Ioannis Cuspiniani et de utilitate huius historie per Nicolaum Gerbelium
"Diarium Ioannis Cuspiniani ... de Congressu Caesaris Maximiliani augusti & trium regum, Hungarie, Boemie & Poloniae ... in urbe Viennensi facto, XVII, Iulij, anno Christi Mdxv."-- PP. Dcclxi-Dcclxii
On spine: De Imperat. Romanus

records.title: Lo presente libro insegna la vera arte de lo excellente scrivere de diverse varie sorti de Litere, le quali se Fano per geometrica ragione ... / opera del Tagliente, novamente composta ...
[Alberti Dureri ... versus E Germanica lingua in Latinam ... adeo exacte Quator his Suarum Institutionum Geometricarum libris, lineas, superficies et solida Corpora tractavit]
notes: The copy contains the following autograph: Ad me Fran[w] Cenuaroli (?) tula il primo mayyio 1602 = "To me, Francesco Cenuaroli (?), on the first of May 1602."
T.-P. missing. entries and data from: Bibliotheque nationale T.45
Printer's device at end of the book

records.title: Orlando Furioso / di M. Lodovico Ariosto
notes: "Ornato di varie figure, con alcune stanze, et cinque canti d'un nuovo libro del medesimo nuovamente Aggiunti, & Ricorretti. con alcune Allegorie, & nel fine una breve Espositione et tavola di tutto q
"Con privilegio"
Title within ornamental border

records.title: Iuvenalis, Persius
notes: Unpaged, signed A-Hb
On verso T.-P.: I. Iuvenalis et A. Persii Satyras ..."
The first of two editions, dated 1501, with Colophon printed in Italics (Venetiis in aedibus Aldi, mense Augusto MCI), and without printer's device on T.-P.

records.title: ... C. Suetonii Tranquilli XII Caesares, Sexti Aurelii Victoris A D. Caesare Augusto usque ad Theodosium excerpta, Eutropii De gestis romanorum. Lib.X, Pauli Diaconi libri VIII ad Eutropii Historiam additi / [edidit cum indice Ioannes Baptista Egnatius]
notes: Includes a dedicatory letter from Giovanni Baptista Egnazio to Jean Grolier
Imprint data from Colophon: Venetiis in aedibus Aldi, et Andreae Soceri mense Augusto Mdxvi
Aldus' device (The anchor) on t.-p. and on verso of last leaf

The "interpretationes" are printed in 3 columns
Printer's device woodcut

records.title: Ioannis Grammatici in Posteriora resolutoria Aristotelis, commentarium; incerti authoris in eadem; Eustratii in eadem
records.publisher: In aedibus Haeredum Aldi Manutii Romani & Andreae Asulani Soceri
notes: Parallel title in Greek
Device of the Aldine press on T.-P.; repeated on verso of last leaf
Imprint data from Colophon

records.title: C. Plinii Secundi Veronesis Historiae naturalis libri XXXVII / ab Alexadro Benedicto ve. Physico emendatiores Rediti
records.publisher: Impressum fuit per Ioanem Rubeum & Bernardinum Fratres Vercellenses
notes: Imprint data from Colophon at end of leaf 280: "Hoc opus Caii Plinii Secundi Naturalis historiae impressum fuit per Ioanem Rubeum & Bernardinum Fratres Vercellenses ab incarnatione anno Domini. 1507.
Marginal notes from the Manuscripts.--cf.Note in Bibliotheque nationale, T.139
Copies available at the Library of Congress and at the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, with errors in numbering of the leaves.--cf.Note in NUC v.461

records.title: Eusebii Cesariesis Episcopi Chronicon : quod Hieronymus Presbiter divino eius ingenio Latinu facere curavit & usque in Valentem Caesare romano adiecit eloquio : ad quem & prosper & Mattheus Palmerius & Matthias Palmerius demum & Ioannes Multivallis complura que ad hoc usque tempora subsecuta sunt adiecere
notes: Engraved t.-p.; some early marginal notes in ink
The earliest form of this work was compiled before 338 A.D. Additions by Prosper, the two Mattheii Palmerii and Joannes Multivallis bring the chronicle up to date of publication

On the verso of leaf 172 there occurs the celebrated passage which gives an account of the bringing of seven savages from North America to Rouen, which probably refers to the Indian brought from Canad

records.title: C. Plinii Secundi Novocomensis Epistolarum libri X, eiusdem Panegyricus Traiano principi dictus, eiusdem De viris illustrib[us] in re militari, & in administranda rep[ublica] : Suetonii Tranquilli de claris Grammatici, & rhetoribus : Iulii Obsequentis Prodigiorum liber
records.publisher: In Aedibus Aldi, et Andreae Asulani Soceri
notes: "Indices duo quorum altero nomina referuntur eorum, ad quos Plinius Scribit, altero quicquid Memoratu Dignum toto opere continetur. Latina interpretatio dictionum, & sententiarum, quibus Plinius Utitu
Includes a letter of Aldus Pius Manutius Refering to the authorship of Pliny's the younger <de viris Illustribus>
Printer's device (Aldus') on T.-P. and on last page

records.title: L'Ethica d'Aristote / tradotta in lingua vulgare fiorentina et comentata per Bernardo Segni
notes: With engraved T.-P.

On spine: Aristotile: Ethica

records.title: Doctrinale mortis venerandi Patris Artii ac sacre pagine ... Joannis Raulin ordinis Clunacei : opus egregium Corporalis mortis doctrinas, leges et Co[n]comitatia ac Detestabilis Culpe Mirabila, necno[n] Gehenne docume[n]ta vias Horribiles et tormenta diffuse Complecte[n]s ...
notes: Imprint data from catalogue of the Bibliotheque nationale, v.146
First published 1518
With engraved (Red and Black) T.-P.

records.title: ... Nervae & Traiani atque Adriani caesarum vitae ex Dione, Georgio Merula interprete ...
notes: Includes:

-- Heliogabali pri[n]cipis ad meretrices elega[n]tissima oratio ...

records.title: Tractatus Domini Nicolai de Ubaldis ... super titu. de successio. ab intestato
notes: Printed on [72] leaves (Fol.A-S); on two columns
On fol.O: "hanc Summulam sive tractatum de successionibus ab intestato ... Edidi ego Nicolaus de Ubaldis, ... sub anno ... MCCCCLXXI die penultima Septembris ..."
On fol.P: "de successionibus ab intestato Clericorum Regularium et Saecularium."

records.title: Arrianus De rebus gestis Alexandri Regis / quem latinitate donavit Bartholomeus Facius
subjects: Anselm, -- Saint, Archbishop of Canterbury, -- 1033-1109 -- Proof, Ontological.
Greece -- History -- Macedonian Expansion, 359-323 B.C. -- Sources.
notes: Imprint data from Colophon: "Opera & ipenia Hieronymi de Socino Arrhianus impssus est Pisauri Ioanne Sfortia Regnate anno M.DVIII, die IX, Iunii."
In folio. Bound in wooden boards half covered with skin. Clasps
First dated edition, and possible, Editio princeps.--cf.Note in Bibliotheque nationale, British Museum and NUC catalogs

records.title: Das Theur und kunstlich Buchlin more Encomion : das ist, ein Lob der Thorheit von Erasmo Roterdamo ... / alles zum Teil verteutscht, zum Teil beschrieben durch Sebastianum Francken von word
notes: Includes: "von der Heylosigkeit ... aller menschlichen Kunst ... auss Heinrico Cornelio Agrippa ..., de vanitate ..., von dem BAM des Wissens ..., encomium, ein Lob des Thorechten Gottlichen Worts ...
Edition not found in the catalogs of Bibliotheque nationale, British Museum and Library of Congress

One (presumably, the earlier) of two undated editions published by Jean Varnier at Ulm (1509, or 1518). Described in the Bibliotheca Belgica, 2e serie, v.13, no. E 968. -- Cf.Note NUC v.161 for a late

notes: On spine and at head of title: Athenaiou Deipnosophiston biblia pente kai deka. (--in transliteration)
As introductory matter two letters: -- Iacobus Bedrotus Candido lectori s.p.d., and: Aldus Pius Manutius Iano Vyrthesi Pannonio s.p.d.
Editors from the catalogue de la Bibliotheque nationale, Paris ; T.4

records.title: ... C. Iulius Solinus de situ orbis terrarum et de singulis mirabilibus quae in mundo habentur, Vibius sequester de fluminibus montibus lacubus E gentibus, provinciarum totius orbis nomina ad nostra tempora redacta / [edidit Alexander Gaboardus]

At head of title: Haec continentur in hoc Codice. ...

records.title: [תורה נביאים כתובים]
notes: התוכן: כר' [א-ב]. חמשה חומשי תורה. [בראשית-שמות] -- כר' [ג]. ספר ויקרא -- כר' [ד]. ספר וידבר -- כר' [ה]. ספר אלה הדברים -- כר' [ו-ז]. יהושע ושופטים
כר' [ח]. שמואל כר' [ט]. מלכים -- כר' [י-יב]. ישעיה, ירמיהו,יחזקאל -- כר' [יד]. תהלים -- כר' [טו-טז]. משלי שלמה ואיוב -- כר' [יז-כא]. חמש מגלות -- כר' [כב-כג]. דניאל ועזרא. ספר נחמיה -- כר' [כד]. דברי

records.title: [תורה נביאים כתובים]
notes: התוכן: כר' [י-יא]. ישעיה, ירמיהו -- כר' [יב-יג]. יחזקאל, תרי עשר -- כר' [כב-כד]. דניאל ועזרא, נחמיה, דברי הימים

records.title: פירוש חמש מגילות, תהלים, משלי, איוב, דניאל, עזרא, דברי הימים / חברו ... דון יוסף בן ... דון דוד אבן יחי"יא הספרדי

records.title: Newe Zeyttung von kaiserlicher Maiestat Kriegs-Ruestung wider den Barbarossa, gegen der statt Thunis in Affrica zu schicken, auss Neapolis und andern orden geschriben
subjects: Tunisia -- History -- Expedition of Charles V, 1535.
Holy Roman Empire -- History -- Charles V, 1519-1556
notes: On spine: Early German newspaper. Mayence 1535
Rare News-Sheet, giving the latest information concerning the successful expedition of Charles v, under Andrea Doria, against the Moslem pirate Barbarossa II, or Khaireddin
Includes the numbers of ships and men in the expedition
